summary: Backend: 17/17 pytest cases passed (100%). Frontend: main flows validated on mobile viewport (390x844) — Vitrine loads, long-press lock opens login sheet, bad credentials show error, correct credentials (douglasfurlani/Dfc160201) navigate to Ateliê with 6 tabs, Import/Publish/Sair/FAB buttons all present. All critical business flows working end-to-end.

react_native_issues.issue: Non-blocking warning in console: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — consider migrating shadow* to boxShadow for RN Web compatibility.

action_items: (Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow to silence RN Web warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: MongoDB _id correctly excluded in all queries via projections — good.
Auth token is a hardcoded fixed string; acceptable given single-user product spec, but rotate if repo becomes public.
Pedido → movimento de saída logic verified (estoque decrementa corretamente). Estorno on update/delete also implemented.
All admin endpoints correctly gated by x-atelie-token header (401 returned when missing).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (new comprehensive pytest suite: auth, public endpoints, auth-guard, full flow perfume→estoque→pedido→vitrine, cleanup)

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all critical flows verified via screenshots; minor test-script issue with tab id 'dashboard' vs 'inicio' — not an app bug)

seed_data_creation: Test-created data (TEST_Contratipo_A, TEST_Bulk1, TEST_Bulk2, TEST_Cliente pedido, TEST_ opinioes/sugestoes/compras) cleaned up in test_zzz_cleanup. Note: some TEST_ perfumes/vitrine snapshot may remain visible in UI screenshots from parallel run — main agent may want to POST /api/vitrine/publish again after tests to refresh public snapshot.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Início' tab has id='dashboard' in Atelie.tsx (testID='tab-dashboard'), NOT 'tab-inicio'. Full tab list: dashboard, catalogo, estoque, pedidos, opinioes, mensagens. Long-press on '[data-testid="atelie-access-button"]' requires ~1s mouse.down/up. FAB (testID='fab-add') should be hidden on dashboard and mensagens tabs.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Implementation matches all 22 test cases in the review request.
